metadata.notes: Issue history for release planning and support triage.

issues.title: Guarantor validation crashes when guarantor list is empty
issues.body:
We are seeing a crash in micro_admin/models.py when a loan is saved without any guarantors. The record imports fine, but the edit form explodes on submit when the guarantor section is left blank.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Open an existing loan
2. Clear the guarantor list
3. Save the form

**Expected**
The form should validate and ask for a guarantor if the rule requires one.

**Observed**
The page returns a 500 and the form does not recover gracefully.

**Notes**
This started showing up after the latest repayment rule changes.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from micro_admin/models.py and the repro is solid.
I can take this one. I will add a regression test and keep the change small.

issues.title: Payment form accepts zero amount on retry
issues.body:
A support user reported that micro_admin/views.py allows a zero-value payment when the submit button is clicked twice in a row. The first submit succeeds, the second one should be rejected but currently slips through.

**Expected**
A duplicate submission should be blocked.

**Observed**
The payment is recorded twice, once with amount and once with zero.

**Context**
This is more visible on slower connections and after the form gets resubmitted from the browser back button.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from micro_admin/views.py and the repro is solid.

issues.title: Ledger totals drift after deleting a stale receipt
issues.body:
Users noticed that totals shown by templates/pdfgeneral_ledger.html no longer match the receipt summary after a stale receipt is removed. The mismatch only appears in branches with several backdated entries.

**Expected**
Summary and detail rows should agree.

**Observed**
The total drops by one entry even though the item was only marked inactive.

**Additional detail**
The issue is reproducible in the month-end report for branch NAGPUR-02.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from templates/pdfgeneral_ledger.html and the repro is solid.

issues.title: Receipt list duplicates row after retry flow
issues.body:
While testing the retry flow in templates/listof_receipts.html, the same receipt appears twice after a failed print attempt. The duplicate is not visible in the database, only in the rendered page.

**Expected**
One row per receipt.

**Observed**
The render shows the receipt twice if the page is refreshed immediately after submit.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from templates/listof_receipts.html and the repro is solid.
I can take this one. I will add a regression test and keep the change small.

issues.title: Client update loses branch selection after save
issues.body:
Updating client details in micro_admin/views.py resets the branch dropdown if the user edits an address field first. The change is subtle but a few branch admins spotted it during daily use.

**Steps**
Open a client, change address, switch branch, save, then reopen.

**Expected**
The selected branch should stay attached to the record.

**Observed**
The branch falls back to the default one.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from micro_admin/views.py and the repro is solid.

issues.title: Savings withdrawal can go negative on partial edit
issues.body:
An edit path in templates/transactions.html does not re-check the account balance before saving a withdrawal. This is only visible when an existing transaction is reopened and changed from the list view.

**Expected**
The balance should never fall below zero.

**Observed**
A negative amount is accepted and the ledger is off by one transaction.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from templates/transactions.html and the repro is solid.

issues.title: Group interest calc uses old rate after approval
issues.body:
When a group loan moves from pending to approved, micro_admin/models.py keeps the previous rate until the page is reloaded. That makes the first preview misleading and the branch manager has to refresh manually.

**Expected**
The new rate should be reflected immediately.

**Observed**
The old percentage remains in the preview pane.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from micro_admin/models.py and the repro is solid.
I can take this one. I will add a regression test and keep the change small.

issues.title: Add installment preview to loan workflow
issues.body:
It would help the field team if micro_admin/tests.py showed a lightweight installment preview before the final save. This is mostly about avoiding a second call back to the office when the calculation looks off.

**Desired behavior**
Show a preview block with amount, tenure, and the next due date.

**Why now**
Several branches are asking for this while training new staff.

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.

issues.title: Export ledger with optional branch filter
issues.body:
Users running monthly reports asked for a branch filter in micro_admin/views.py. Right now they have to export the full ledger and filter it manually in a spreadsheet.

**Acceptance criteria**
- branch filter is optional
- existing export stays unchanged when the filter is empty
- the output still matches the current PDF layout

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.
I can wire this up once we agree on the UI copy.

issues.title: Improve payment form hints for first-time operators
issues.body:
Operators asked for a clearer hint set in micro_admin/views.py, especially around date entry and amount rounding. The form is usable today, but the warnings are easy to miss.

**Desired outcome**
Add inline guidance without changing the underlying validation rules.

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.

issues.title: Allow receipt reprint from the list page
issues.body:
Support asked for a quick reprint action in templates/receiptsform.html. The current flow forces users to open the receipt first, which is fine on desktop but annoying on smaller screens.

**Requested behavior**
Add a reprint action to the row menu.

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.

issues.title: Make client search remember the last branch
issues.body:
Branch users want templates/clientledgertable.html to remember the last branch they were working in. It would save them from reselecting the same branch dozens of times a day.

**Request**
Persist the branch choice per user session.

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.

issues.title: Should we document the branch approval flow?
issues.body:
We keep answering the same support question about who can approve a loan and where the approval history lives. Should we add a short section to README.rst before the next rollout?

**Context**
The answer seems obvious to the team, but not to the branch office.

comments.body: I think we should document it before changing the behavior.

issues.title: Docs: add setup notes for local branch testing
issues.body:
The onboarding notes in docs/source/index.rst are missing the steps for local branch testing. This keeps coming up when someone clones the app and tries to run it against a test database.

**Scope**
Add the missing steps and a short troubleshooting section.

comments.body: Good idea. I will update the doc and the small template copy in the same pass.

Open a client, change address, switch branch, save, then reopen.

**Expected**
The selected branch should stay attached to the record.

**Observed**
The branch falls back to the default one.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from micro_admin/forms.py and the repro is solid.
I can take this one. I will add a regression test and keep the change small.

issues.title: Savings withdrawal can go negative on partial edit
issues.body:
An edit path in templates/deposits.html does not re-check the account balance before saving a withdrawal. This is only visible when an existing transaction is reopened and changed from the list view.

**Expected**
The balance should never fall below zero.

**Observed**
A negative amount is accepted and the ledger is off by one transaction.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from templates/deposits.html and the repro is solid.

issues.title: Group interest calc uses old rate after approval
issues.body:
When a group loan moves from pending to approved, templates/group/dashboard.html keeps the previous rate until the page is reloaded. That makes the first preview misleading and the branch manager has to refresh manually.

**Expected**
The new rate should be reflected immediately.

**Observed**
The old percentage remains in the preview pane.

comments.body: Confirmed. This is coming from templates/group/dashboard.html and the repro is solid.

issues.title: Add installment preview to loan workflow
issues.body:
It would help the field team if micro_admin/tests.py showed a lightweight installment preview before the final save. This is mostly about avoiding a second call back to the office when the calculation looks off.

**Desired behavior**
Show a preview block with amount, tenure, and the next due date.

**Why now**
Several branches are asking for this while training new staff.

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.

issues.title: Export ledger with optional branch filter
issues.body:
Users running monthly reports asked for a branch filter in micro_admin/views.py. Right now they have to export the full ledger and filter it manually in a spreadsheet.

**Acceptance criteria**
- branch filter is optional
- existing export stays unchanged when the filter is empty
- the output still matches the current PDF layout

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.
I can wire this up once we agree on the UI copy.

issues.title: Improve payment form hints for first-time operators
issues.body:
Operators asked for a clearer hint set in micro_admin/views.py, especially around date entry and amount rounding. The form is usable today, but the warnings are easy to miss.

**Desired outcome**
Add inline guidance without changing the underlying validation rules.

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.

issues.title: Allow receipt reprint from the list page
issues.body:
Support asked for a quick reprint action in templates/receiptsform.html. The current flow forces users to open the receipt first, which is fine on desktop but annoying on smaller screens.

**Requested behavior**
Add a reprint action to the row menu.

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.

issues.title: Make client search remember the last branch
issues.body:
Branch users want micro_admin/views.py to remember the last branch they were working in. It would save them from reselecting the same branch dozens of times a day.

**Request**
Persist the branch choice per user session.

comments.body: Makes sense. I would keep the API backward compatible and hide the change behind a default.

issues.title: Should we document the branch approval flow?
issues.body:
We keep answering the same support question about who can approve a loan and where the approval history lives. Should we add a short section to docs/source/conf.py before the next rollout?

**Context**
The answer seems obvious to the team, but not to the branch office.

comments.body: I think we should document it before changing the behavior.

issues.title: Docs: add setup notes for local branch testing
issues.body:
The onboarding notes in README.rst are missing the steps for local branch testing. This keeps coming up when someone clones the app and tries to run it against a test database.

**Scope**
Add the missing steps and a short troubleshooting section.

comments.body: Good idea. I will update the doc and the small template copy in the same pass.
